codeQuality.comments: Well-structured interactive planning with readline. Good separation of concerns with suggestFeatureBreakdown heuristic. Proper stdin/stdout injection for testability. Clean async flow handling.

sharedStateObservations: Test mock input sequences must match exact number of features generated. Goal 'Build CLI commands' matches both 'cli' and 'command' keywords, generating 4 features instead of 2.

VAL-M2-PLAN-001.notes: Enters interactive mode with prompts for goal input and confirmation. Also accepts goal from input parameter.

VAL-M2-PLAN-002.notes: Plan acceptance creates features with generated IDs (F1, F2, F3...) and stores them correctly.

VAL-M2-PLAN-003.notes: Plan rejection leaves files unchanged - no features are created when user rejects.

VAL-M2-PLAN-004.notes: Modification workflow allows editing feature descriptions, skills, preconditions, and expected behavior. Also supports adding custom features.
